provisions.content: The exportation of the Export Controlled Goods specified in the Schedule hereto from any place in the United Republic of Tanzania other than the ports of Bukoba, Kagera or Nyamirembe is hereby authorised. Schedule Description Classification in official import and export list Group Code Coffee 071 01 01 071 01 02 071 01 03 071 01 04 071 01 05 071 01 06 071 01 07 History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
